reference: Hi, I awoke two nights ago with a sharp, throbbing pain just below my navel, on the right-hand side. The pain was not too severe; however, I thought nothing of it. Since this morning, I am now feeling a vibration in my scrotum. It occurs every few minutes or seconds and usually only lasts about two seconds.
text: Hi. I awoke 2 nights ago with a sharp, throbbing pain just below my navel, on the right-hand side. The pain was not too severe; however, I thought nothing of it. Since this morning I am now feeling a vibration in my scrotum. It occurs every few minutes or seconds, and usually only lasts about 2 seconds.
